understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the '+' goal gem by navigating through the level while avoiding hazards like spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT triggers automatic gravity fall (vertically until landing on solid tiles or hitting hazards); gravity has direction (DOWN decreases y); CLICK removes breakable 'x' blocks; UNDO reverts the last move; limited steps per attempt with failure on spikes or steps exhausted.
